/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/meos.dir/code/main_linux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meos.dir/code/StdAfx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meos.dir/code/gdioutput_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/meos.dir/code/meos_stubs.cpp.o -o meos  vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libhpdf.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/librestbed.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libsqlite3.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libgtest.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libpng16.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libz.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libminizip.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libpng16d.a vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libz.a -lm -ldl -lm vcpkg_installed/x64-linux/lib/libz.a
